shared_attributes.interaction: spawned and consumed by game systems

context.game: Pico Echo - virtual pet cockatiel game
context.role: Echo's food, appears in food bowl, consumed during eating animation
context.screen_position: Inside food_bowl at (16, 100), multiple seeds scattered
context.usage_scenario: Appears when player taps food bowl to fill. 6-8 seeds shown when bowl is full, 3-4 when low, 0 when empty. Individual seed disappears when Echo eats.

animation.description: No animation. Seeds are static until consumed (instant disappear).

visual_specification.details: 3x3px golden orange (#FFA300) pixel cluster. Slightly irregular shape (not perfect square). Multiple seeds arranged randomly within food bowl bounds. Each seed is independent object. Disappears instantly when consumed by Echo.

relationships.differences_from: poop: orange vs brown, in bowl vs on floor, food vs waste. Smaller than any other game object.

explicit_negations: Seeds do not bounce or roll
Seeds do not grow or shrink
